title: Windows Encoded PowerShell Execution
description: Detects execution of PowerShell with encoded commands, commonly used to obfuscate malicious scripts.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*powershell.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*-enc *' or 'Command Line' like '*-EncodedCommand*' or 'Command Line' like '*-ec *' or 'Command Line' like '*FromBase64String*')))
